name: Besa
metaTitle: Property in Besa Nagpur | Affordable Plots & Flats | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy affordable NMRDA approved plots in Besa Nagpur. Close to Wardha Road, schools & hospitals. Starting ₹22 Lakh with 90% bank finance.
introduction: Besa is one of Nagpur's most popular destinations for budget residential buyers and first-time investors. Located off Wardha Road, Besa offers excellent connectivity to the city while remaining more affordable than premium corridors. The area has schools, hospitals, and daily convenience infrastructure already in place, making it suitable for immediate family living. NMRDA-approved layouts in Besa have seen consistent 12–20% annual appreciation driven by the area's proximity to Wardha Road and MIHAN. Mahalaxmi Infra has completed multiple projects in the Besa-Beltarodi zone.
whyInvest: Among Nagpur's most affordable residential areas near Wardha Road
Schools, hospitals, and markets already in place
Proximity to MIHAN without premium pricing

faqs.question: Is Besa a good area to buy property in Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Yes. Besa is one of Nagpur's most popular areas for affordable residential plots. It offers good connectivity, established social infrastructure, and consistent appreciation.

faqs.question: What is the price of plots in Besa Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Plot prices in Besa vary by size and exact location. Mahalaxmi Infra projects near Besa start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for current availability.

faqs.question: Is bank loan available for plots in Besa?
faqs.answer: Yes. NMRDA approved plots in Besa are eligible for up to 90% bank finance from major banks including SBI, Bank of Maharashtra, and Axis Bank.
